title: Recursive Intent Fabric (RIF)
confidence_note: High coverage across HTN, BDI, VSM, workflow engines, federated systems, formal methods, and 2025-2026 multi-agent landscape

key_predecessors: BDI agents — Jadex goal-as-entity model (Rao & Georgeff 1995)
intent_based_orchestration.assessment: Well-established field. RIF contributes specific combination of typed intent + operation-class mapping, not the underlying concept.

recursive_hierarchical_orchestration.assessment: Thoroughly explored in computing and organizational theory. Novelty lies in specific formalization for AI agent systems, not the pattern.

key_predecessors: Gorelkin — VSM for Enterprise Agentic Systems (2025)
vsm_in_computing.assessment: VSM application to computing is well-documented. Gorelkin 2025 applies VSM directly to agentic AI. RIF novelty is in specific implementation within planetary-scale intent fabric.

intent_lifecycle_objects.assessment: Meaningful synthesis: typed intent objects with decomposition constraints + resource bounds + success criteria + 5-state lifecycle mapping to formal algebra. Not found as integrated package.

key_predecessors: Apache Mesos resource offers (sovereignty via two-level scheduling)
sovereignty_preservation.assessment: Sovereignty addressed in multiple domains. RIF's specific contribution: enumerated non-interference guarantees in AI orchestration context. The field has identified the problem (Sovereign Agents 2026) but not proposed an orchestration solution.

formal_decomposition_algebra.assessment: Most novel component. Binding formal decomposition rules to domain-specific operation-class ontology (M/B/X/V/G) with cycle prevention has limited direct precedent.

novelty_gaps: Unified intent-lifecycle + decomposition-algebra + VSM-governance stack (no existing system combines all three)
Operation-class-bound decomposition algebra (DETROIT closest but limited to QoS in networking)
Enumerated sovereignty non-interference guarantees as formal architectural constraints
Two-plane architecture with VSM mapping specifically for distributed AI agent orchestration
Intent quanta as metabolic-style lifecycle objects mirroring knowledge metabolism
Governance-gated parameter changes for ALL orchestration parameters (more restrictive than any existing system)
overall_assessment: Architectural-integrative novelty rather than component-novel. Each of 6 components has prior art. The specific integration — formally-algebraic intent decomposition governed by VSM System 3/4 with sovereignty constraints over CRDT infrastructure substrate — does not exist as unified system. Formal decomposition algebra bound to operation classes is most novel individual component.
